message:
feat(engine): add ES2020 stdlib baseline with deterministic builtins (RGC-306)

Introduce a capability-aware standard library module implementing
deterministic, cross-architecture builtin constructors and prototype
methods for the bytecode VM substrate:

- Tiered coverage model: Tier 1 (Array/Object/String/Math/JSON/Number/
  Boolean), Tier 2 (Map/Set/Date/etc.), Tier 3 (WeakMap/Proxy/Reflect)
- Fixed-point arithmetic using millionths (1_000_000 = 1.0) for
  reproducible results across architectures
- BuiltinId enum for dispatch from bytecode interpreter to native impls
- BTreeMap/BTreeSet for deterministic ordering; #![forbid(unsafe_code)]
- Integration tests: install_stdlib initialization, prototype chain
  correctness, registry completeness, method execution, determinism
  guarantees, serde round-trip fidelity, error taxonomy coverage
- Wire into lib.rs module tree

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
